name: WD_ANIM_BOOT
description: Boot animation orchestrator managing multiple sequential ImageSequencePlayer playlists. Converts animation definitions into playlist format and plays them in order. Calls onReady when complete sequence finishes.
visualForm: Full-screen sequential animation player for boot sequences (ThinQ logo → product intro)
descriptionKo: 여러 순차 ImageSequencePlayer 플레이리스트를 관리하는 부팅 애니메이션 오케스트레이터입니다. 애니메이션 정의를 플레이리스트 형식으로 변환해 순서대로 재생하고, 완료 시 onReady를 호출합니다.
descriptionEn: Boot animation orchestrator managing multiple sequential ImageSequencePlayer playlists. Converts animation definitions into playlist format and plays them in order. Calls onReady when complete sequence finishes.
